title: linum usitatissimum var. humile
intro: Linum usitatissimum var. humile, also known as dwarf flax or low-growing flax, is a subspecies of the flax plant, Linum usitatissimum, which is a annual herb that grows up to 1-2 meters tall. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of mucilage, a thick, protective substance that soothes and calms irritated tissues, reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The health benefits of Linum usitatissimum var. humile include its ability to relieve digestive issues, such as irritable bowel syndrome, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, including hot flashes and night sweats. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being, particularly in cases of stress, anxiety, and skin conditions.
